name: coEmergency
title: coEmergency
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coEmergency( dword active, dword emcyError, byte specificData[], dword dataSize, dword errCode[] );
The function activates or deactivates an emergency error code. The error register [0x1003,0] and the 'Predefined error field' object are set. An emergency message is also sent.
active Specifies whether an error code should be activated or deactivated0 - deactivates emergency state1 - activates emergency state2 - activates and deactivates automatically after a few seconds
emcyError Emergency error code, value range 0..65.535
specificData Manufacturer-specific data (maximum 5 bytes are copied)
dataSize Length of the specific data in bytes
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)

Example dword errCode[1];byte data[5] = { 0, 0, 0, 0 };coEmergency ( 1, 0x8120, data, elcount(data), errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "Error passive mode entered" );}coEmergency ( 0, 0x8120, data, elcount(data), errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "Error active mode entered" );}
